We've delivered the three blogs, and we're starting to, we've gotten all your feedback.
So then by the end of this week, we want to get those published and then indexed.
So that's where we're going to be.
And then week six, which is next week, at that point, we're ramping up.
So we're a little bit ahead in the sense of, like, we're going to be delivering the first batch of blogs tomorrow.
But broadly speaking, that's where we're at.
We're just at the cusp of full production and analytics.
Amazing.
I love, love, love hearing that we're, like, a little ahead of schedule.
That's exciting.
I like it, too.
I got to jump.
Thank you so much, everyone.
Yeah.
All right.
Thank you.
Bye.
Bye.
Bye.
Thank

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, review process, and initial blog drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Accuracy is paramount:** Content must be factually correct and align with Turnstile's core marketing narrative. The "Quote to Cash" draft was problematic as it contradicted the company's value prop.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [**Feedback fuels the AI:** Both direct edits and conceptual feedback are critical. GrowthX's managing editor, Ify, uses this input to refine the AI's writing guidelines, ensuring future content is on-brand.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [**Blog images need a refresh:** The current illustrated style is too "cartoony" and dark. A new direction is needed that is brighter, uses more yellow, and provides visual differentiation between posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [**Blog launch is imminent:** The first three articles will be in staging this week. This enables the Turnstile team to review and launch the blog by Monday, starting the data collection process.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Topics

### Initial Content Review & Feedback

  - [The first three blog drafts provided critical feedback for refining the AI's output.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**"Revenue Leakage":** Well-received; required minimal edits.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [**"Competitors":** Contained factual errors (e.g., incorrect pricing).](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [**"Foundations of Quote to Cash":** The most problematic draft.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Contradicted Marketing Narrative:** Advised manual processes for 20-30 customers and standardizing pricing *before* adopting a Q2C system.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
      - [**Turnstile's Pitch:** The product provides the flexibility to standardize pricing *while* using a Q2C system, making the article's advice counterproductive.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Minor Inaccuracy:** Used "drag and drop" instead of the more precise "WYSIWYG" to describe the UI.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
          - [**Decision:** "Drag and drop" is acceptable as a colloquial term communicating ease of use.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

### Content Strategy & Process

  - [**Cadence:** 5 articles/week, with a 4–5 day review cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Review Process:** A structured schedule will be implemented to ensure timely feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Example:** GrowthX delivers articles → Seema reviews by Monday → Jordan reviews by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Author:** Jordan Zamir will be the sole author.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Avoids the awkwardness of the CEO citing himself and is practical for a small team.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will create an author bio for Jordan in Webflow to build SEO authority.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Blog Image Direction

  - [Initial image concepts were reviewed.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
      - [**Option 1 (Illustrated):** Rejected as too "cartoony" and dark.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [**Option 2 (Clean/Minimal):** Preferred for its style but lacked visual differentiation between posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [**New Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [**Style:** Brighter, less dark, and with more prominent use of the brand's yellow.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
      - [**Differentiation:** Maintain visual variety between posts.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
          - [**Idea:** Develop an iconography "ontology" to assign specific image styles to topics (e.g., gears for workflows, charts for finance).](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Action:** Seema will provide visual references to guide the new direction.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)

### Webinar Content Repurposing

  - [Aida confirmed the upcoming webinar is a strong candidate for content repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Topic:** SaaS pricing in the age of AI.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Speakers:** Turnstile's CEO and Kyle Poyer (a prominent expert).](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [**Plan:** Use the webinar transcript as "fuel" for SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
      - [**Tactics:** Extract quotes for blog posts, brainstorm new topics, and create a unique content artifact for programmatic use.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### Blog Launch & Reporting

  - [**Launch Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)
      - [GrowthX will place the first three articles in staging this week.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
      - [Turnstile's web agency will review and push the blog live by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [**Reporting Dashboard:** A dashboard is in development to track content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [**Status:** GA4 integration is in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Will provide high-level metrics and page-specific analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (William):**](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Create Jordan's author bio in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Place the first three articles in staging this week.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [**Turnstile (Seema):**](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [Provide visual references for the new blog image direction.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
      - [Coordinate with the web agency to launch the blog by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/HvGEgxSoNzUwsczeE4WRyAYyhEBEPa59?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

action_items.description: Create Jordan author bio in Webflow; link to blog posts
Confirm w/ Ify delivery day; then send 5–6 articles to Seema/Jordan; request 4–5d review
Update writing guidelines (ICP/positioning, accuracy, drag-and-drop); then rerun 3 calibration articles
Assign blog image style to Danny/Tori; share examples w/ William; then GrowthX produce brighter, yellow-forward illustrations
Push 3 revised calibration articles to staging; then Turnstile web agency review/launch blog
